runTitle: Local AI Retrieval GraphRAG Tombstone Route Removal QA
coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run AI Engine route registration

completedImprovements.title: Remove legacy /api/ai/graphrag/* 410 tombstone route
completedImprovements.evidence: Deleted cloud-run/ai-engine/src/routes/graphrag.ts and route test; removed server.ts dynamic import and app.route('/api/ai/graphrag', ...).

completedImprovements.title: Confirm no recent external usage before tombstone removal
completedImprovements.evidence: gcloud logging read showed 0 /api/ai/graphrag/* requestUrl hits in the last 7 days; newest 30-day hits were 2026-04-13 manual/curl-era calls.

completedImprovements.title: Reduce legacy contracts to useGraphRAG input compatibility only
completedImprovements.evidence: legacy-contracts.ts no longer exports graphRuntimeRoutes or 410 payload helpers; searchKnowledgeBase.useGraphRAG remains compat-only.

completedImprovements.title: Route removal and retrieval compatibility tests pass
completedImprovements.evidence: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npx vitest run src/lib/legacy-contracts.test.ts src/knowledge-runtime-cleanup.test.ts src/tools-ai-sdk/reporter-tools/knowledge-search-tool.test.ts src/lib/knowledge-retrieval-lite.test.ts

completedImprovements.title: Type, lint, quick, contract, docs, and AI Engine full tests pass
completedImprovements.evidence: AI Engine type-check/test, root type-check/lint/test:quick/test:contract, docs:budget, docs:ai-consistency, and git diff --check all passed.

notes: Knowledge Retrieval Lite remains BM25 search_knowledge_text + metadata boost; no GraphRAG runtime route remains registered.
/api/ai/graphrag/* will now fall through to normal missing-route behavior after API middleware instead of returning an explicit 410 tombstone.
This QA is local deterministic validation only because no production deployment was performed in this turn.
